history.text: Province of the West Indies Federation tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Trinidad and Tobago became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.
Joined the Caribbean Community at the Treaty of Chaguaramas.
Trinidad and Tobago became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.

worthSeeing.title: Trinidad Carnival:
worthSeeing.text: The world's most exuberant street party - two days of soca, costumes and crowds.

worthSeeing.title: Steelpan Music:
worthSeeing.text: Trinidad invented the steelpan - the only acoustic instrument created in the 20th century.

worthSeeing.title: Asa Wright Nature Centre:
worthSeeing.text: A premier birdwatching lodge in a rainforest estate with 170 species on-site.

planningQuestions.q: What is Trinidad and Tobago known for?
planningQuestions.a: Trinidad Carnival, Steelpan Music, Asa Wright Nature Centre.
